browse_ballot_questions_intro: Track ballot questions by year, court, and status, then open each question for voter perspective, hearings, and context.
browse_ballot_questions_empty: No ballot questions are available for {{year}}.

ballot_question_referendum_how_vote_work.title: How the vote works
ballot_question_referendum_how_vote_work.body: This is a referendum on a law the Legislature has already enacted. <0>A YES vote keeps this law in effect.</0> <1>A NO vote repeals it.</1>

ballot_question_no_results: No ballot questions match the current filters.

campaignFinancials.description: Committee receipts and expenditures from the {{year}} ballot question filings.
campaignFinancials.expendituresTooltip: Cash spent by the campaign to support its objectives
campaignFinancials.inKindsTooltip: Cash value of contributions to the campaign made in goods, services, or commodities
campaignFinancials.notAvailable: Campaign finance information is not yet available.
campaignFinancials.receiptsTooltip: Contributions made in cash to the campaign
campaignFinancials.title: Campaign Financials
campaignFinancials.titleTooltip: Committee receipts and expenditures are filed with the Office of Campaign and Political Finance.
campaignFinancials.totalTooltip: Value of cash and in-kind expenditures made by the campaign

committeeHearing.description: Committee hearings are public meetings where legislators reviewed the proposed ballot question, asked questions, and heard testimony from the public and experts. At this stage, the Legislature had the opportunity to pass the proposal into law instead of sending it to voters.
committeeHearing.title: Committee Hearing

fiscalConsequences.title: Statement of Fiscal Consequences
fiscalConsequences.tooltip: As required by law, statements of fiscal consequences are written by the Executive Office of Administration and Finance.

forAndAgainst.argumentsBody: Official ballot argument information is provided by the Commonwealth of Massachusetts.
forAndAgainst.noCommitteeText: Committee information is not yet available.
forAndAgainst.noStatementText: No official statement has been made.

header.question: Question
header.questionNumberDisclaimer: Question numbers are assigned by the Secretary of State in the summer prior to an election

overview.description: Understand the question, key details, and ballot context.
overview.officialSummary: Official summary by the Massachusetts Attorney General
overview.officialSummaryTooltip: As required by law, summaries are written by the State Attorney General.
overview.title: Overview

synthesis.description: Vote effects and fiscal consequences from the voter guide.
synthesis.title: Synthesis & Insights

testimonies.relatedBillPrefix: You can review testimony on the related bill
testimonies.title: Perspectives

voteEffects.title: What your vote will do
voteEffects.tooltip: As required by law, the statements describing the effect of a yes or no vote are written jointly by the State Attorney General and the Secretary of the Commonwealth.

yourPerspective.closed: Perspectives are no longer being accepted for this ballot question.
yourPerspective.notAvailable: Perspectives are not available for this ballot question yet.
yourPerspective.title: Your Perspective
